sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id Int32, event_time DateTime64(3, 'Asia/Shanghai'));
SELECT id, dateTime64ToSnowflake(event_time) AS snowflake_id FROM test_timestamps;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = toDateTime64('2022-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3, 'Asia/Shanghai') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, dateTime64ToSnowflake(event_time) AS snowflake_id FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
